name: Crockpot Beef and Peppers
recipeInstructions:
Use dried onions or finely chop about 1/2 of a fresh onion.
1. Cut the steak into serving size pieces. If desired you can brown the meat in a little hot oil before adding to crockpot. Place the thinly sliced pepper rings in the bottom of the crockpot, reserving a few to place on top of the meat if desired. (Vegetables cook better when placed at the bottom of the pot.) Arrange the meat on the peppers, being careful not to stack one piece directly on top of another. Mix all other ingredients and pour over the meat and peppers.
2. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for about 4 hours.
Serve with mashed potatoes and simply seasoned vegetables.
